title: BBN
oneLiner: An AI-assisted local media platform — lightweight production agent workflows handling editorial automation and content ranking at low cost.
proof: Low-cost applied AI in production: lightweight agent workflows doing real editorial automation and ranking on local media infrastructure — cost and reliability treated as first-class constraints.
highlights: Lightweight
cost-efficient agent workflows running in production
Editorial automation and content ranking for a local media platform
AI publishing infrastructure with real reliability and cost constraints
aiSummary: BBN is an AI-assisted local media platform: lightweight production agents for editorial automation and ranking, proving low-cost applied AI that stays reliable.

title: BuenPick
oneLiner: A live local-commerce startup — a food-rescue marketplace connecting merchants and buyers, with mobile, admin and product all shipped under real friction.
proof: Proof of shipping beyond prototypes: a running marketplace with active merchants, built and operated end-to-end — marketplace, mobile app, admin and the product calls that come with real users.
highlights: Live food-rescue marketplace with active merchants and real buyers
Marketplace + mobile app + admin executed and operated end-to-end
Product decisions forged under real local-commerce friction
not a demo
aiSummary: BuenPick is a live food-rescue local-commerce startup with active merchants — founder-level execution across marketplace, mobile and admin, shipped beyond prototype.

title: LumenScript
labTitle: LumenScript — AI Writing Platform & Orchestration Engine
oneLiner: An AI-native writing platform and multi-model orchestration engine — routing intent across models with memory, canon and evaluation loops.
proof: Not a prompt wrapper. Real AI architecture: multi-model orchestration, project memory and canon, and evaluation loops that judge output before it ships — heading toward BYOK via OpenRouter.
highlights: Multi-model orchestration routes each task to the right model by capability, cost and latency
Project memory + canon keep long-form generation consistent instead of drifting
Evaluation loops score and refine output instead of trusting a single pass
Platform direction: OpenRouter/BYOK so teams bring their own keys and models
aiSummary: LumenScript is the flagship: a multi-model orchestration engine with memory, canon and evaluation loops — AI architecture, not a prompt wrapper, built toward a BYOK platform.

title: Trading Ecosystem
oneLiner: Leviathan: a quant R&D platform fusing market intelligence (whales, news, sentiment), Strategy-Pattern backtesting and rules-based risk management.
proof: Honest quant engineering: async FastAPI services, modular strategies, and a strict Risk Manager governing every signal — built to validate edge, not to promise returns.
highlights: Market intelligence layer fuses whale activity, news and sentiment signals
Modular backtesting framework (Strategy Pattern) for pluggable strategies
Rules-based Risk Manager governs every signal before execution
Async, decoupled FastAPI architecture designed for testability
aiSummary: The Trading Ecosystem shows Juan's depth in financial AI systems design and disciplined R&D pivots.

title: Delify
oneLiner: A founder-built e-commerce platform running for real businesses — catalog, orders and payments owned end to end.
proof: Founder execution: a live e-commerce serving real merchants, with full-stack ownership from infrastructure to checkout UX.
highlights: Live e-commerce platform serving real merchants
Catalog, orders and payments owned end to end
Full-stack ownership: infra, backend, storefront UX
The commerce foundation that later spawned the Delibot agent layer
aiSummary: Delify is a live WhatsApp-first commerce platform, reinforcing Juan's founder execution track record.

title: RecApp / Azure PoC
oneLiner: An enterprise AI claims analyzer for insurance: an Intent Router on Azure OpenAI classifies each claim and hands it to a specialized agent for a structured answer.
proof: Enterprise cloud AI: intent classification over Azure OpenAI, specialized agents per claim type, and local RAG (MiniLM + ChromaDB) grounding answers in a knowledge base.
highlights: Intent Router classifies claims and routes them to specialist AI agents
Azure OpenAI SDK integration — enterprise-grade cloud architecture
Local RAG: MiniLM embeddings + ChromaDB over an insurance knowledge base
FastAPI backend with a clean single-page front (Tailwind)
aiSummary: RecApp is Juan's enterprise AI Orchestrator PoC on Azure, proving cloud multi-agent architecture skills.

title: Delibot
oneLiner: A full-stack WhatsApp e-commerce agent using a Tool-First Architecture to eradicate hallucinations.
proof: Production reliability: an LLM acts as an intent router selecting deterministic tools, so every operation is predictable and fact-based.
highlights: Tool-First Architecture eliminates AI hallucinations in actions
LLM as intent router selecting deterministic tools (e.g. AddToCart)
RAG over product catalog with ChromaDB
Deterministic cart/order operations persisted with SQLAlchemy
aiSummary: Delibot proves Juan's anti-hallucination Tool-First Architecture for reliable production AI agents.

title: Dataset Creator
oneLiner: A Python ETL pipeline that turns raw market data into context-enriched JSONL datasets for fine-tuning specialized trading AI models.
proof: Transforms noisy market data into consistent, context-rich training examples, reducing manual curation and making specialized AI fine-tuning workflows reproducible.
highlights: Automated ETL processing of raw market data
LLM-powered contextual enrichment
Structured normalization with quality filtering
Training-ready JSONL for fine-tuning workflows
aiSummary: Dataset Creator reflects Juan's pragmatic approach to AI infrastructure: a focused Python pipeline that converts raw market information into structured, context-enriched training data for specialized models.

title: AI Lab (RunPod)
oneLiner: A distributed RAG lab split in two: a local 'brain' orchestrating the pipeline and a RunPod GPU 'muscle' serving 4-bit quantized inference.
proof: MLOps discipline: total separation of orchestration and inference, VRAM-safe model loading, and embedding parity between the local FAISS knowledge base and the remote /embed endpoint.
highlights: 'Brain & Muscle' split: local orchestrator + Dockerized RunPod inference server
ModelManager 'VRAM dance' loads 4-bit quantized models without OOM crashes
FAISS knowledge base with embedding parity between local build and remote /embed
Build → verify locally → deploy: Docker images tested before touching the GPU
aiSummary: The RunPod AI Lab shows Juan's MLOps approach to cost-efficient distributed inference.

title: Kaelos
oneLiner: A RAG-based agentic system performing semantic analysis over large volumes of legal documents.
proof: Domain agility: repurposing a mastered AI stack to solve high-impact problems in the legal domain.
highlights: RAG architecture over large legal document sets
Semantic analysis for high-impact legal problems
Fast repurposing of an existing tech stack to a new domain
Chunking and vector search tuned for long, dense legal texts
aiSummary: Kaelos shows Juan applying RAG agentic systems to the legal domain with fast stack reuse.

title: Code Saver
oneLiner: A GUI tool that consolidates a whole codebase into a single prompt to accelerate AI-assisted development.
proof: Meta-efficiency: removes a key bottleneck in AI-assisted analysis, debugging and refactoring.
highlights: Extracts and consolidates an entire codebase into one prompt
Accelerates analysis, debugging and refactoring cycles
Desktop GUI built with PySide6
Output shaped for LLM context windows: filtered noise, ordered files, one paste
aiSummary: Code Saver is Juan's meta-efficiency tool for faster AI-assisted development workflows.
